narrative: A failure cascades through a delegation chain when an upstream agent is revoked. APS verifyDelegation accepts a cachedRevocationState parameter so downstream verifiers reach the same deny verdict without a live registry hit, structurally bounding cascade failure to a single-hop blast radius.

expected_outcome.verifier_assertion: verifyDelegation must return { valid: false, revoked: true } when cached revocation state says revoked
